verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everyone needs compassion A love that's never failing, let mercy fall on me Everyone needs forgiveness The kindness of a Savior, the Hope of nations.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Savior, He can move the mountains My God is mighty to save. He is mighty to save. Forever, author of Salvation He rose and conquered the grave. Jesus conquered the grave.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So take me as You find me All my fears and failures. Fill my life again. I give my life to follow everything I believe in. Now I surrender. (I surrender.)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Savior, He can move the mountains My God is mighty to save. He is mighty to save. Forever, author of Salvation He rose and conquered the grave. Jesus conquered the grave.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Shine Your light and let the whole world see We're singing for the glory of the risen King, Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Shine Your light and let the whole world see We're singing for the glory of the risen King.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Singin' Majesty, Majesty Your grace has found me just as I am Empty handed but alive in Your hands

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We're singing Majesty, we're singing Majesty Forever, forever I am changed by Your love In the presence of Your Majesty

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Savior, He can move the mountains My God is mighty to save. He is mighty to save. Forever, author of Salvation He rose and conquered the grave. Jesus conquered the grave.
